payload.label: rug

payload.long_description: Rectangular cream/off-white runner rug with large orange and pink floral motifs and a narrow decorative border, printed low-pile textile lying on a hardwood floor and partially cut off at the right/top edge; faint script-like markings visible near the center; approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
